case_title: RICHARD L SCHWARTZ MD VS. KATHLEEN SULLIVAN ALIOTO

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHWARTZ MD, RICHARD L AS TO DEFENDANT ALIOTO, KATHLEEN SULLIVAN EXECUTRIX OF THE ESTATE OF JOSEPH L ALIOTO AND TRUSTEE OF THE ALIOTO TRUST JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHWARTZ MD, RICHARD L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALIOTO, KATHLEEN SULLIVAN EXECUTRIX OF THE ESTATE OF JOSEPH L ALIOTO AND TRUSTEE OF THE ALIOTO TRUST $210,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $14,267.00 INTEREST, $206.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $224,473.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
